## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences on what this PR changes and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` new feature
- [ ] `fix` bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` no behavior change
- [ ] `docs` / `chore` / `config` / `perf` / `style` / `security`

## Manual checks

<!-- Tick everything that applies. CI handles lint, build, unit tests, axe audits (WCAG 2.2 AA), touch targets, focus rings, forced colors, zoom, and focus traps automatically. -->

- [ ] **Screen reader** — tabbed through the changed flow with VoiceOver or NVDA. Dynamic updates are announced correctly. _(required for any UI change; not automatable)_
- [ ] **New routes** — added to `public/sitemap.xml`, the `prerender` array in `react-router.config.ts`, and the routes table in `README.md`. _(required when a new page or route is added)_
